name: Précision Métaux Montréal
description: High-precision CNC machining of aluminum, titanium, and stainless steel aerospace components. AS9100D and ISO 9001:2015 certified. 3-axis and 5-axis milling, turning, and grinding capabilities for critical flight hardware.

name: Fabrication Laval Métal
description: Sheet metal fabrication specialist offering laser cutting, press brake bending, and MIG welding for industrial and HVAC applications. ISO 9001 certified with fast turnaround.

name: Soudure & Assemblage Québec
description: Certified welding services including TIG, MIG, and friction stir welding. Specializes in aluminum and stainless steel structures for the transportation and rail industries.

name: Revêtements Industriels Sherbrooke
description: Surface treatment and finishing for aerospace and automotive parts: anodizing, hard anodizing, powder coating, electroplating, and shot blasting. Nadcap approved for chemical processing.

name: Impression 3D Montréal
description: Additive manufacturing services including FDM, SLA, and direct metal laser sintering (DMLS) for rapid prototyping and low-volume production of complex geometries. Materials include aluminum, titanium, and Inconel.

name: Usinage CNC Longueuil
description: Precision CNC turning and milling for the defense and medical device industries. Wire EDM capabilities for tight-tolerance tooling. ISO 13485 and ISO 9001 certified.

name: Découpe Laser Ontario
description: High-volume laser and waterjet cutting for sheet metal and non-metallic materials. Fast turnaround for automotive and consumer electronics OEMs. IATF 16949 certified.

name: Structures Soudées Drummond
description: Heavy structural welding and assembly for construction and mining equipment. Certified welding procedures for carbon steel, alloy steel, and stainless steel. CWB and ISO 3834-2 certified.

name: Pièces de Précision Trois-Rivières
description: CNC machining and sheet metal fabrication for hydraulic and pneumatic component manufacturers. Specializes in high-volume production runs with tight tolerances. ISO 9001 certified.

name: Traitement de Surface Ottawa
description: Painting, powder coating, and electroplating services for industrial and architectural applications. Specializes in corrosion-resistant coatings for outdoor infrastructure.
